recent_60_samples.prompt: Your favorite café just moved to a new location.
recent_60_samples.answer: How far is it from the main campus?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get a chance to check out the new gym equipment?
recent_60_samples.answer: I tried the rowing machine before class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the recruiter ask you after the interview?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know my earliest available start date.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you going to trivia night tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't finished my chemistry problem set yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you leave your bike lock?
recent_60_samples.answer: The teammate who used it left it in my locker.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Your econ midterm sounded pretty rough this term.
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering about my econ midterm grade this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the housing office tell you about the elevator repair?
recent_60_samples.answer: The broken elevator was finally fixed this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you after class today?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know whether I had submitted the lab report before the deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the registrar's office say about the transfer credits?
recent_60_samples.answer: My transfer credits were finally approved by the registrar's office this semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's a sign-up sheet for the ultimate frisbee club tryouts.
recent_60_samples.answer: I signed up for the beginner session on Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You just heard the dining hall menu changed today.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which stations are open for dinner tonight?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you settled into the new apartment yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I unpacked most of my boxes last night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian say about your overdue book?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether I still had the book at home.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you two finish planning the road trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: We haven't booked the hotel for Saturday night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find someone to cover your shift?
recent_60_samples.answer: The coworker who covered my shift wants a favor back.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Does your new schedule feel different from last semester's?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering about my new schedule for this term.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did maintenance say about the broken heater?
recent_60_samples.answer: The heater in my room was finally repaired this afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Coach Alvarez ask you before the game?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know if I had recovered from the ankle injury yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your neighbor say about the noise complaint?
recent_60_samples.answer: The neighbor who filed the noise complaint finally apologized after the meeting.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the campus shuttle route changed this week.
recent_60_samples.answer: I checked the new shuttle schedule online this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Harold try the new fitness machines?
recent_60_samples.answer: I tried the new rowing machine this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: There's a new shuttle running downtown.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I catch the campus shuttle?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the library changed its hours.
recent_60_samples.answer: How late does the main library stay open?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Olivia hear anything about the trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wanted to know whether the trip was canceled.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Does Mariana know the exact deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the deadline had already passed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Hector find the seminar details?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked Hector about the seminar room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you signed up for the workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not registered for the workshop yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Naomi remind you about registration?
recent_60_samples.answer: You should not miss the registration deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Julian mention how the paper went?
recent_60_samples.answer: My economics professor praised the detailed research paper that I submitted last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Diane update you on the scholarship?
recent_60_samples.answer: My full scholarship application was finally approved by the registrar last Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: The bookstore still has my textbook on hold.
recent_60_samples.answer: You should pick up the book before closing.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check on the lab hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out whether the lab closed early on Fridays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know if Emma's permit is still valid?
recent_60_samples.answer: I could not recall if the permit had expired.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I still haven't started tonight's reading assignment.
recent_60_samples.answer: You should not skip the reading assignment tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the group project delay?
recent_60_samples.answer: The teammate who missed the group deadline finally apologized to everyone today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the housing office about the repair request?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was unsure whether the maintenance team could visit.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just switched my major to biology this semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which advisor should I meet with about my new requirements?

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seem relieved about something today.
recent_60_samples.answer: I've finally submitted my thesis draft to my advisor.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you talked to your roommate about the lease renewal?
recent_60_samples.answer: My roommate signed the new lease yesterday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the library renovation?
recent_60_samples.answer: The reading room on the second floor was finally reopened to students this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: My presentation slides still need a lot of work.
recent_60_samples.answer: You should finish your slides before tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check with the front desk about the parking pass?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was unsure if the parking pass had arrived yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find out about the internship deadline?
recent_60_samples.answer: I figured out whether the application had closed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sign up for the ski trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not paid the trip deposit yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the dining hall changes?
recent_60_samples.answer: The salad bar on the first floor was finally reopened after the renovation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the coach say about practice today?
recent_60_samples.answer: Practice moved to the indoor courts because of rain.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I've never been to the career fair before.
recent_60_samples.answer: What should I bring to the career fair?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish moving into the new apartment?
recent_60_samples.answer: The friend who helped me move canceled at the last minute.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your essay?
recent_60_samples.answer: I submitted it right before the deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to Professor Cho about the extension?
recent_60_samples.answer: I checked whether the final paper deadline could be moved to next week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished writing up the experiment?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't finished my lab report yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I can't find the tickets for tonight's show.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did you leave the concert tickets?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you know if we can use the seminar room?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked Hector whether the seminar room was booked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you see Margot at the library earlier?
recent_60_samples.answer: I couldn't tell whether Margot had left already.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I thought Emma was coming to study with us.
recent_60_samples.answer: You didn't invite Emma to the study session.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You mentioned trying out a new student group.
recent_60_samples.answer: Olivia joined the club that meets on weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sort out your campus parking permit?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've picked up my parking pass this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I finally met with my academic advisor today.
recent_60_samples.answer: What did the advisor tell you about registration?

recent_60_samples.prompt: You seemed curious about Mariana's project status.
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out whether Mariana had already submitted the final report.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just got feedback on my seminar essay.
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor who taught the seminar praised my final research essay.
